items.title: claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
items.description_zh: Claude Code 是一种代理编码工具，它位于您的终端中，了解您的代码库，并通过执行例行任务、解释复杂代码和处理 git 工作流程来帮助您更快地编码 - 所有这些都通过自然语言命令进行。

items.title: VibeVoice
items.description_zh: 开源前沿语音人工智能

items.title: timesfm
items.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
items.description_zh: TimesFM（时间序列基础模型）是 Google Research 开发的用于时间序列预测的预训练时间序列基础模型。

items.title: claude-howto
items.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
items.description_zh: 克劳德代码的可视化、示例驱动指南——从基本概念到高级代理，以及可带来即时价值的复制粘贴模板。

items.title: axios
items.description: Promise based HTTP client for the browser and node.js
items.description_zh: 适用于浏览器和 Node.js 的基于 Promise 的 HTTP 客户端

items.title: codex
items.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
items.description_zh: 在您的终端中运行的轻量级编码代理

items.title: prompts.chat
items.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.description_zh: F.K.A.很棒的 ChatGPT 提示。分享、发现并收集社区中的提示。免费和开源——为您的组织自行托管，并具有完全的隐私。
